message:
feat(extensions): add SEC-7.2 graduated enforcement rollout with rollback guards

Implements graduated rollout phases (Shadow → LogOnly → EnforceNew → EnforceAll)
with automatic rollback triggers based on error rate, false positive rate, and
latency SLO thresholds. Adds config/env var support for enforce flag and
operator-inspectable rollout state snapshot.

- Add RolloutPhase enum, RollbackTrigger config, RolloutTracker state machine
- Add ExtensionRiskConfig.enforce + PI_EXTENSION_RISK_ENFORCE env var support
- Add ExtensionManager API: set/advance/inspect rollout phase + record decisions
- Rollback auto-triggers to Shadow when SLO breached (FP rate, error rate, latency)
- 9 new integration tests covering phase progression, reversibility, rollback
  triggers, non-enforcing phase safety, state inspection, and enforce flag sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
